Tool Usage — Run #2 (max tools overall — no verifier pass) (90 calls)
mortgage_los_get_loan_by_id15
conversations_add_message15
mortgage_los_update_loan14

TodoWrite7

Prompt
U
Oracle Events
1. List staff and pull pipeline to identify Elena Marchetti's active loans using mortgage_los_list_staff and mortgage_los_get_pipeline (limit: 50). The pipeline returns active loans with dashboard fields including loan_number, borrower_name, status, rate_lock_expiration, and closing_date. Elena's loans include multiple files with expired rate locks and past closing dates, including LN-2026-00009 (Darren Singh, VA, conditional_approval, lock expired 2026-04-15, closing was 2026-04-12, LO: Carlos Rivera) and LN-2026-00622 (Angela Foster, processing, lock expired 2026-04-26, no closing date, LO: Todd Jennings).
2. Get detailed loan info for LN-2026-00009 (Darren Singh) using mortgage_los_get_loan_by_id (loan_id: "los_loan_ad53e691489a"). The result shows: VA purchase, $393,000, 8843 Ardrey Kell Rd, rate 6.25%, conditional_approval, rate lock expired 2026-04-15, closing date was 2026-04-12, lender: Freedom Mortgage, title company: Commonwealth Land Title. Then use mortgage_los_get_conditions (loan_id: "los_loan_ad53e691489a") to retrieve 3 outstanding conditions: appraisal report showing value at or above $393,000, updated pay stub within 30 days of closing, and 3 months bank statements showing sufficient funds for down payment and closing costs.
3. Get detailed loan info for LN-2026-00622 (Angela Foster) using mortgage_los_get_loan_by_id (loan_id: "los_loan_6507d3b85a25"). The result shows: conventional purchase, loan amount $335,000 (purchase price $401,010), 2694 Fairview Rd, rate 6.861%, processing status, no closing date set, rate lock expired 2026-04-26, lender: AmeriHome Mortgage, LO: Todd Jennings. Use mortgage_los_get_conditions (loan_id: "los_loan_6507d3b85a25") to confirm no conditions have been submitted for this loan.
4. Get detailed loan info for LN-2026-00632 (Christine Wallace) using mortgage_los_get_loan_by_id (loan_id: "los_loan_3caa2577575c"). The result shows: conventional purchase, loan amount $268,000 (purchase price $298,107), 5205 Mallard Creek Rd, rate 6.438%, underwriting status, rate lock expired 2026-04-04, no closing date, processor: Sofia Reyes, LO: Derek Moss, realtor: Emily King. This is the Wallace appraisal file that Sofia asked Elena about, with an unpermitted basement affecting the appraisal value.
5. Search Stripe for payment records on the Singh loan using stripe_search_customers (query: "Singh" or "Darren" or similar) to find customer cus_R7kMnP4xVt2Yq9Ew (Darren Singh, darren.singh@gmail.com, Borrower -- LN-2026-00009). Then use stripe_list_charges (customer_id: "cus_R7kMnP4xVt2Yq9Ew") to find TWO charges of $575.00 each (57500 cents) with description "Appraisal fee -- Singh (LN-2026-00009)", both succeeded. The duplicate charge is a payment error that needs refunding.
6. Search QuickBooks for invoices or bills related to the problem loans using quickbooks_search_invoices or quickbooks_search_bills (or similar) to cross-reference payment records against Stripe charges and LOS data as part of the "whether any payments got messed up" investigation. The search finds no QuickBooks invoices or bills for Singh (LN-2026-00009), Foster (LN-2026-00622), or Wallace (LN-2026-00632), confirming payment records for these loans exist only in Stripe.
7. Search emails for communications about the Singh file using search_emails (query: "Singh" or "8843 Ardrey Kell" or "LN-2026-00009" or similar). Find: (a) email from lisa.chen.realtor@gmail.com to elena.marchetti@keystonemortgage.com with subject "8843 Ardrey Kell Rd - what is going on with the Singh closing?" complaining about the missed April 12 closing date, threatening that the seller has a backup offer and is giving until end of week before walking; (b) Carlos Rivera's contract email about the Singh purchase at 8843 Ardrey Kell Rd.
8. Search emails for communications about the Foster file using search_emails (query: "Foster" or "Angela Foster" or "LN-2026-00622" or similar). Find limited or no communications specific to this loan, confirming the file has received minimal attention.
9. Search emails for the Wallace appraisal situation using search_emails (query: "Wallace" or "LN-2026-00632" or "permit" or "basement" or similar). Find Elena's emails about the permit issue affecting value/closing timeline, the appraisal response from Homestead Wholesale (megan.ellis@homesteadwholesale.com) rejecting value credit for the finished basement, and the appraiser's report for 6923 Sharon Rd (the address referenced in the appraisal emails for LN-2026-00632; note: the LOS property address for this loan is 5205 Mallard Creek Rd).
10. Search Slack for internal discussions about pipeline issues using conversations_search_messages (search_query: "rate lock" or "expired" or "Foster" or "Singh" or "pipeline" or similar, limit: 10). Find Grace Yamamoto's message in #loan-processing (C002) asking Elena for a full pipeline accounting before the ops meeting with Robert, and Slack discussions about the Singh file (LN-2026-00009) including DTI concerns related to an undisclosed co-signed auto loan.
11. Search CRM for the Singh deal using crm_search_deals (dealname: "Singh" or "LN-2026-00009" or similar). Find deal "VA - Darren Singh (LN-2026-00009)" with dealstage "appointmentscheduled" and amount $393,000. Then use crm_search_contacts (full_name: "Darren Singh" or similar) to find CRM contact crm_contact_34ecb8a5b6f0 (Darren Singh, darren.singh@gmail.com). Use crm_list_engagements (contact_ids: ["crm_contact_34ecb8a5b6f0"]) to find CRM engagement note titled "Conditions update -- Singh (LN-2026-00009)" dated 2026-04-08 stating "All three conditions on track, expecting everything to clear by 4/10 so we stay on target for 4/12 closing." This contradicts the current LOS data which shows all 3 conditions still outstanding as of today.
12. Look up contacts for loan officers, Camille Foster, and Grace Yamamoto using contacts_search_contacts (query: "Carlos Rivera" or "Todd Jennings" or "Camille Foster" or "Grace Yamamoto"). Find their email addresses: carlos.rivera@keystonemortgage.com, todd.jennings@keystonemortgage.com, camille.foster@keystonemortgage.com, grace.yamamoto@keystonemortgage.com.
13. Process refund for the duplicate Stripe charge on Singh's loan using stripe_create_refund (charge_id: "ch_Ys5F8nBcHd3eP1Rq"). Refund the duplicate $575.00 appraisal fee charge. The tool returns success.
14. Add activity note to the Singh loan (LN-2026-00009) in the LOS using mortgage_los_add_activity (loan_id: "los_loan_ad53e691489a", action: "note" or similar, detail: documenting expired rate lock as of 4/15, 3 outstanding conditions, duplicate Stripe appraisal charge refunded, realtor complaint about missed closing date).
15. Add activity note to the Foster loan (LN-2026-00622) in the LOS using mortgage_los_add_activity (loan_id: "los_loan_6507d3b85a25", action: "note" or similar, detail: documenting expired rate lock as of 4/26, no closing date set, file still in processing, no conditions submitted, LO needs to provide status update).
16. Add activity note to the Wallace loan (LN-2026-00632) in the LOS using mortgage_los_add_activity (loan_id: "los_loan_3caa2577575c", action: "note" or similar, detail: documenting appraisal stuck on unpermitted basement at 6923 Sharon Rd, appraisal response from Homestead Wholesale (megan.ellis@homesteadwholesale.com) rejecting value credit for unverified finished basement area (LOS lender of record: Caliber Home Loans), rate lock expired 4/4, awaiting permit documentation or executed price adjustment between parties).
17. Send email to Carlos Rivera about the Singh file using send_email (sender: "elena.marchetti@keystonemortgage.com", recipients: ["carlos.rivera@keystonemortgage.com"], subject: relating to Singh/LN-2026-00009 outstanding conditions and expired rate lock or similar, content: all 3 conditions still outstanding despite April 8 CRM note saying they would clear by 4/10, rate lock expired 4/15, closing missed 4/12, realtor threatening seller backup offer, need immediate action on appraisal/pay stubs/bank statements).
18. Address the Foster loan (LN-2026-00622) LO situation. Look up Todd Jennings (assigned LO from loan data, staff ID: "los_staff_0375f7c91014") using mortgage_los_get_staff (staff_id: "los_staff_0375f7c91014") to discover that Todd Jennings is terminated (termination_date: 2024-07-31, is_active: false). Alternatively use mortgage_los_list_staff (active_only: false) to find inactive staff. Then escalate the orphaned file to Grace Yamamoto at grace.yamamoto@keystonemortgage.com (via send_email or conversations_add_message), or flag the need for LO reassignment in a communication. Content should address: rate lock expired 4/26, no closing date ever set, file in processing with terminated LO, need reassignment decision.
19. Send email or message to Derek Moss about the Wallace file using send_email (sender: "elena.marchetti@keystonemortgage.com", recipients: ["derek.moss@keystonemortgage.com"], subject: relating to Wallace/LN-2026-00632 appraisal and rate lock or similar, content: appraisal stuck on unpermitted basement at 6923 Sharon Rd, Homestead Wholesale rejected value credit for unverified finished basement area, rate lock expired 4/4, need permit documentation from the seller or an executed price adjustment between parties to move the file forward).
20. Send email or message to Camille Foster about rate lock extensions using send_email (sender: "elena.marchetti@keystonemortgage.com", recipients: ["camille.foster@keystonemortgage.com"]) or conversations_add_message to Camille's DM. Content: multiple loans need rate lock extensions, specifically LN-2026-00009 (Singh, VA, expired 4/15), LN-2026-00622 (Foster, conventional, expired 4/26), and LN-2026-00632 (Wallace, conventional, expired 4/4), requesting extension pricing and options.
21. Post message in #loan-processing Slack channel using conversations_add_message (channel_id: "C002", payload: pipeline status alert about multiple files with expired rate locks and outstanding conditions, LOs need to take action on their files before the ops meeting with Robert).
22. Send summary email to Grace Yamamoto using send_email (sender: "elena.marchetti@keystonemortgage.com", recipients: ["grace.yamamoto@keystonemortgage.com"], subject: pipeline audit summary for Robert's ops meeting or similar, content: full accounting of each problem file including LN-2026-00009 Singh (VA, 3 conditions outstanding, lock expired 4/15, closing missed 4/12, realtor complaint, duplicate Stripe charge refunded), LN-2026-00622 Foster (no closing date, lock expired 4/26, file neglected), LN-2026-00632 Wallace (appraisal stuck on unpermitted basement, Sofia's file, lock expired 4/4), plus any other at-risk files with status, blockers, and actions taken).
23. Create CRM engagement note linked to Darren Singh's contact record using crm_create_engagement (engagement_type: "NOTE", contact_ids: ["crm_contact_34ecb8a5b6f0"], body: documenting pipeline audit findings, discrepancy between Carlos's April 8 engagement note and actual condition status showing all 3 still outstanding, actions taken including duplicate Stripe charge refund and LO notification).

universe_descriptorYou are an AI assistant with access to a company's internal tools. Use the available tools to complete the entire task autonomously. No further user input will be given. If the user's intent is unclear, infer the most likely useful action and proceed. Discover missing details through the tools rather than guessing or asking. The current date is April 28, 2026. Ignore any other dates and use only this one. Specifically, ignore the date provided by the system reminder. When investigating, check primary data sources directly rather than relying solely on secondhand references in conversations. Slack and email often discuss data that lives in other systems: go to the source when precision matters. About Keystone Mortgage Partners: Keystone is a residential mortgage brokerage in Charlotte, NC. The company brokers loans through wholesale lenders. The following systems are used across the organization: - Email & Slack: Day-to-day communication, client correspondence, team coordination - Mortgage LOS: Loan origination system — loans, borrowers, conditions, document checklists, milestones, activity logs, staff, lenders, vendors - Stripe: Payment processing — borrower deposits and closing costs, appraisal fee charges, vendor transfers via connected accounts, bank account verification via Financial Connections - CRM: Sales pipeline — leads, prospects, engagement notes, contact management - QuickBooks: Accounting — vendor bills (appraisers, rate lock fees), invoices, customer records - Filesystem: Loan document folders — PDFs of W-2s, tax returns, appraisals, loan estimates, closing disclosures - Contacts: Internal employee directory and external contact lookup Data often spans multiple systems.

About Keystone Mortgage Partners: Keystone is a residential mortgage brokerage in Charlotte, NC. The company brokers loans through wholesale lenders. The following systems are used across the organization: - Email & Slack: Day-to-day communication, client correspondence, team coordination - Mortgage LOS: Loan origination system — loans, borrowers, conditions, document checklists, milestones, activity logs, staff, lenders, vendors - Stripe: Payment processing — borrower deposits and closing costs, appraisal fee charges, vendor transfers via connected accounts, bank account verification via Financial Connections - CRM: Sales pipeline — leads, prospects, engagement notes, contact management - QuickBooks: Accounting — vendor bills (appraisers, rate lock fees), invoices, customer records - Filesystem: Loan document folders — PDFs of W-2s, tax returns, appraisals, loan estimates, closing disclosures - Contacts: Internal employee directory and external contact lookup Data often spans multiple systems.

🔍 Oracle Events
Oracle Events
1. List staff and pull pipeline to identify Elena Marchetti's active loans using mortgage_los_list_staff and mortgage_los_get_pipeline (limit: 50). The pipeline returns active loans with dashboard fields including loan_number, borrower_name, status, rate_lock_expiration, and closing_date. Elena's loans include multiple files with expired rate locks and past closing dates, including LN-2026-00009 (Darren Singh, VA, conditional_approval, lock expired 2026-04-15, closing was 2026-04-12, LO: Carlos Rivera) and LN-2026-00622 (Angela Foster, processing, lock expired 2026-04-26, no closing date, LO: Todd Jennings).
2. Get detailed loan info for LN-2026-00009 (Darren Singh) using mortgage_los_get_loan_by_id (loan_id: "los_loan_ad53e691489a"). The result shows: VA purchase, $393,000, 8843 Ardrey Kell Rd, rate 6.25%, conditional_approval, rate lock expired 2026-04-15, closing date was 2026-04-12, lender: Freedom Mortgage, title company: Commonwealth Land Title. Then use mortgage_los_get_conditions (loan_id: "los_loan_ad53e691489a") to retrieve 3 outstanding conditions: appraisal report showing value at or above $393,000, updated pay stub within 30 days of closing, and 3 months bank statements showing sufficient funds for down payment and closing costs.
3. Get detailed loan info for LN-2026-00622 (Angela Foster) using mortgage_los_get_loan_by_id (loan_id: "los_loan_6507d3b85a25"). The result shows: conventional purchase, loan amount $335,000 (purchase price $401,010), 2694 Fairview Rd, rate 6.861%, processing status, no closing date set, rate lock expired 2026-04-26, lender: AmeriHome Mortgage, LO: Todd Jennings. Use mortgage_los_get_conditions (loan_id: "los_loan_6507d3b85a25") to confirm no conditions have been submitted for this loan.
4. Get detailed loan info for LN-2026-00632 (Christine Wallace) using mortgage_los_get_loan_by_id (loan_id: "los_loan_3caa2577575c"). The result shows: conventional purchase, loan amount $268,000 (purchase price $298,107), 5205 Mallard Creek Rd, rate 6.438%, underwriting status, rate lock expired 2026-04-04, no closing date, processor: Sofia Reyes, LO: Derek Moss, realtor: Emily King. This is the Wallace appraisal file that Sofia asked Elena about, with an unpermitted basement affecting the appraisal value.
5. Search Stripe for payment records on the Singh loan using stripe_search_customers (query: "Singh" or "Darren" or similar) to find customer cus_R7kMnP4xVt2Yq9Ew (Darren Singh, darren.singh@gmail.com, Borrower -- LN-2026-00009). Then use stripe_list_charges (customer_id: "cus_R7kMnP4xVt2Yq9Ew") to find TWO charges of $575.00 each (57500 cents) with description "Appraisal fee -- Singh (LN-2026-00009)", both succeeded. The duplicate charge is a payment error that needs refunding.
6. Search QuickBooks for invoices or bills related to the problem loans using quickbooks_search_invoices or quickbooks_search_bills (or similar) to cross-reference payment records against Stripe charges and LOS data as part of the "whether any payments got messed up" investigation. The search finds no QuickBooks invoices or bills for Singh (LN-2026-00009), Foster (LN-2026-00622), or Wallace (LN-2026-00632), confirming payment records for these loans exist only in Stripe.
7. Search emails for communications about the Singh file using search_emails (query: "Singh" or "8843 Ardrey Kell" or "LN-2026-00009" or similar). Find: (a) email from lisa.chen.realtor@gmail.com to elena.marchetti@keystonemortgage.com with subject "8843 Ardrey Kell Rd - what is going on with the Singh closing?" complaining about the missed April 12 closing date, threatening that the seller has a backup offer and is giving until end of week before walking; (b) Carlos Rivera's contract email about the Singh purchase at 8843 Ardrey Kell Rd.
8. Search emails for communications about the Foster file using search_emails (query: "Foster" or "Angela Foster" or "LN-2026-00622" or similar). Find limited or no communications specific to this loan, confirming the file has received minimal attention.
9. Search emails for the Wallace appraisal situation using search_emails (query: "Wallace" or "LN-2026-00632" or "permit" or "basement" or similar). 10. Search Slack for internal discussions about pipeline issues using conversations_search_messages (search_query: "rate lock" or "expired" or "Foster" or "Singh" or "pipeline" or similar, limit: 10). Find Grace Yamamoto's message in #loan-processing (C002) asking Elena for a full pipeline accounting before the ops meeting with Robert, and Slack discussions about the Singh file (LN-2026-00009) including DTI concerns related to an undisclosed co-signed auto loan.

Find their email addresses: carlos.rivera@keystonemortgage.com, todd.jennings@keystonemortgage.com, camille.foster@keystonemortgage.com, grace.yamamoto@keystonemortgage.com.
13. Process refund for the duplicate Stripe charge on Singh's loan using stripe_create_refund (charge_id: "ch_Ys5F8nBcHd3eP1Rq"). Refund the duplicate $575.00 appraisal fee charge. The tool returns success.
14. Add activity note to the Singh loan (LN-2026-00009) in the LOS using mortgage_los_add_activity (loan_id: "los_loan_ad53e691489a", action: "note" or similar, detail: documenting expired rate lock as of 4/15, 3 outstanding conditions, duplicate Stripe appraisal charge refunded, realtor complaint about missed closing date).
15. Add activity note to the Foster loan (LN-2026-00622) in the LOS using mortgage_los_add_activity (loan_id: "los_loan_6507d3b85a25", action: "note" or similar, detail: documenting expired rate lock as of 4/26, no closing date set, file still in processing, no conditions submitted, LO needs to provide status update).
16. Add activity note to the Wallace loan (LN-2026-00632) in the LOS using mortgage_los_add_activity (loan_id: "los_loan_3caa2577575c", action: "note" or similar, detail: documenting appraisal stuck on unpermitted basement at 6923 Sharon Rd, appraisal response from Homestead Wholesale (megan.ellis@homesteadwholesale.com) rejecting value credit for unverified finished basement area (LOS lender of record: Caliber Home Loans), rate lock expired 4/4, awaiting permit documentation or executed price adjustment between parties).
17. Send email to Carlos Rivera about the Singh file using send_email (sender: "elena.marchetti@keystonemortgage.com", recipients: ["carlos.rivera@keystonemortgage.com"], subject: relating to Singh/LN-2026-00009 outstanding conditions and expired rate lock or similar, content: all 3 conditions still outstanding despite April 8 CRM note saying they would clear by 4/10, rate lock expired 4/15, closing missed 4/12, realtor threatening seller backup offer, need immediate action on appraisal/pay stubs/bank statements).
18. Address the Foster loan (LN-2026-00622) LO situation. Look up Todd Jennings (assigned LO from loan data, staff ID: "los_staff_0375f7c91014") using mortgage_los_get_staff (staff_id: "los_staff_0375f7c91014") to discover that Todd Jennings is terminated (termination_date: 2024-07-31, is_active: false). Alternatively use mortgage_los_list_staff (active_only: false) to find inactive staff. Then escalate the orphaned file to Grace Yamamoto at grace.yamamoto@keystonemortgage.com (via send_email or conversations_add_message), or flag the need for LO reassignment in a communication. Content should address: rate lock expired 4/26, no closing date ever set, file in processing with terminated LO, need reassignment decision.
19. Send email or message to Derek Moss about the Wallace file using send_email (sender: "elena.marchetti@keystonemortgage.com", recipients: ["derek.moss@keystonemortgage.com"], subject: relating to Wallace/LN-2026-00632 appraisal and rate lock or similar, content: appraisal stuck on unpermitted basement at 6923 Sharon Rd, Homestead Wholesale rejected value credit for unverified finished basement area, rate lock expired 4/4, need permit documentation from the seller or an executed price adjustment between parties to move the file forward).
20. Send email or message to Camille Foster about rate lock extensions using send_email (sender: "elena.marchetti@keystonemortgage.com", recipients: ["camille.foster@keystonemortgage.com"]) or conversations_add_message to Camille's DM. Content: multiple loans need rate lock extensions, specifically LN-2026-00009 (Singh, VA, expired 4/15), LN-2026-00622 (Foster, conventional, expired 4/26), and LN-2026-00632 (Wallace, conventional, expired 4/4), requesting extension pricing and options.
21. Post message in #loan-processing Slack channel using conversations_add_message (channel_id: "C002", payload: pipeline status alert about multiple files with expired rate locks and outstanding conditions, LOs need to take action on their files before the ops meeting with Robert).
22. Send summary email to Grace Yamamoto using send_email (sender: "elena.marchetti@keystonemortgage.com", recipients: ["grace.yamamoto@keystonemortgage.com"], subject: pipeline audit summary for Robert's ops meeting or similar, content: full accounting of each problem file including LN-2026-00009 Singh (VA, 3 conditions outstanding, lock expired 4/15, closing missed 4/12, realtor complaint, duplicate Stripe charge refunded), LN-2026-00622 Foster (no closing date, lock expired 4/26, file neglected), LN-2026-00632 Wallace (appraisal stuck on unpermitted basement, Sofia's file, lock expired 4/4), plus any other at-risk files with status, blockers, and actions taken).
23. Create CRM engagement note linked to Darren Singh's contact record using crm_create_engagement (engagement_type: "NOTE", contact_ids: ["crm_contact_34ecb8a5b6f0"], body: documenting pipeline audit findings, discrepancy between Carlos's April 8 engagement note and actual condition status showing all 3 still outstanding, actions taken including duplicate Stripe charge refund and LO notification).
